recommendations.title: Look Both Ways
recommendations.overview: On the night of her college graduation, Natalie's life splits into parallel realities after she takes a pregnancy test. What will life and love bring?

recommendations.title: Isn't It Romantic
recommendations.overview: For a long time, Natalie, an Australian architect living in New York City, had always believed that what she had seen in rom-coms is all fantasy. But after thwarting a mugger at a subway station only to be knocked out while fleeing, Natalie wakes up

recommendations.title: The Summer of Sangaile
recommendations.overview: Sangaile, a 17-year-old spending the summer at her parents’ lakeside villa, becomes drawn to a free-spirited girl she meets at a nearby aeronautical show. As they grow closer, she begins to confront her fears and embrace a connection that encourages

recommendations.title: Do Revenge
recommendations.overview: A dethroned queen bee at a posh private high school strikes a secret deal with an unassuming new student to enact revenge on one another’s enemies.

recommendations.title: Snow Day
recommendations.overview: When an entire town in upstate New York is closed down by an unexpected snowfall, a "snow day" begins when a group of elementary school kids, led by Natalie Brandston, try to ensure that the schools stay closed by stopping a mechanical snowplow drive

recommendations.title: In My Dreams
recommendations.overview: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: LOL Surprise: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Dazzling doll sisters Queen Bee and Royal Bee make their first movie with help from their fashionable friends in this one-of-a-kind magical adventure.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: Life Is Sweet
